titles.title: Hallelujah your worthy to be praised!

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I lift my hands i praise you lord, I bow my head i honor you Lord! Hallelujah your worthy to be praised! I lift my hands i praise you lord, I bow my head i honor you Lord Hallelujah your worthy to be praised Hallelujah your worthy to be praised Hallelujah your worthy to be praised Hallelujah your worthy TO BE PRAISED!...

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Hallelujah we praise your name Hallelujah so worthy Hallelujah, lord we lift you up! Halleljuah youre worthy! Hallelujah we praise your name Hallelujah so worthy Hallelujah, lord we lift you up! Lord we lift you up!
